scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:spec && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && npm install && npm run build:spec && cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd backend && pm2 restart streakmeet-api || pm2 start dist/index.js --name streakmeet-api && pm2 save && nginx -t && systemctl reload nginx
